title: Deal Overview
description: Explore the deal overview page to review metrics, activity timeline, status management, and navigate between deal sections.

steps.narration: The deal overview gives you a complete picture of the Meridian Dynamics engagement. The header shows the company name, current status badge, industry, and the deal name below.
The metrics cards track four key indicators: touches completed out of four, days in pipeline, when the last activity happened, and total interactions. These give you a quick health check on any deal.
The activity section shows every interaction for this deal in a timeline. You can see pre-call briefings, Touch 1 discovery sessions, and Touch 2 presentations, each with their status and date.
Click the status badge in the header to update the deal status. You can change it to open, won, lost, or abandoned as the engagement progresses.
The assignment picker in the upper right lets you manage who works on this deal. You can change the owner and add collaborators so the right people have access.
Navigate to the Briefing tab to access meeting preparation. This page shows the shared assistant banner and any previous briefings generated for this deal.
The Touch tabs let you run different stages of engagement. Touch 1 is your discovery and one-pager generation, with each subsequent touch building on the previous work.
Back on the overview, the persistent deal assistant at the bottom follows you across all deal pages. Use it to ask questions, save notes, or prepare for meetings without leaving context.
